name: Stephanie Kifowit
bio: Stephanie Kifowit is an Illinois State Representative from Oswego (IL House District 84, Aurora area) and a U.S. Marine Corps veteran. She's running for Illinois Comptroller in the 4-way Democratic primary on March 17, 2026. Known as a progressive voice in the Illinois House, Kifowit has championed veterans' issues, healthcare, and government accountability.

jacket.note: Fundraising totals not confirmed. Second-tier fundraiser behind Croke and Villa.
